case_title: SUZANNE CHIN TUNG VS. CHARLES JOSEPH WIBBELSMAN

COPYING FEES (18 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF TUNG, SUZANNE CHIN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WIBBELSMAN, CHARLES JOSEPH

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2016 BY DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF SUZANNE CHIN TUNG. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHARLES JOSEPH WIBBELSMAN. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-25-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TUNG, SUZANNE CHIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WIBBELSMAN, CHARLES JOSEPH $2,010.99 PRINCIPAL, $147.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,158.49, (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
